THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN GENERAL REALTY INVESTMENT CORPORATION,INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRANCHISE TAX BOARD OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA $2,669,904.54 PRINCIPAL, $518,237.94 PRE-JUDGMENT INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,188,142.48, PLTF. SHALL HAVE AND RECOVER THE SUM CERTAIN OF $2,669,904.54 CONSISTING OF TAXES OVERPAID AND INTEREST ON SUCH TAXES UP TO THE DATE OF PAYMENT ON OCTOBER 26, 2000, TOGETHER WITH PRE-JUDGMENT INTEREST ON SUCH SUM FROM THE DATE OF PAYMENT TO THE DATE OF JUDGMENT, IN THE SUM OF $518,237.94, FROM AND AGAINST DEFT. FRANCHISE TAX BOARD, WITH COSTS OF SUIT IN SUCH AMOUNT AS MAY SUBSEQUENTLY BE ASCERTAINED AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF, AS THE PREVAILING PARTY. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
